prompt: A majestic Chinese ink-wash fantasy poster inspired by Journey to the West, composed as a double-exposure silhouette of {argument name="character name" default="Sun Wukong"} in left-facing profile occupying most of the page. The portrait is formed from soft sepia, ash gray, parchment white, and smoky black watercolor textures on an off-white paper background with splattered brush edges and negative space. The figure has a strong simian facial profile, a short beard, and a golden circlet across the brow. Inside and around the silhouette, build a layered mythic landscape in traditional shan shui style with luminous mist, cliffs, clouds, and ancient temples. At the top center inside the head, place a glowing full moon behind a celestial Buddha-like figure seated above a grand heavenly palace complex with multiple tiered roofs. In the upper-middle right, show 4 traveling figures on a cliff path: a monkey warrior with a staff, a monk riding a white horse, a pig-faced companion, and a dark-robed companion. In the middle, depict 1 dramatic battle scene of the monkey warrior confronting a coiling dragon or serpent in swirling clouds. In the lower-right, place 1 illuminated temple shrine nestled in the mountains with a golden sacred statue visible inside. In the lower area, add 3 tiny pilgrims walking through the misty valley. Use atmospheric depth, elegant calligraphic brushwork, drifting fog, and a refined cinematic composition that feels painterly rather than digital. Add vertical Chinese calligraphy on the left reading {argument name="title text" default="西游记"}, with smaller vertical side text and several seal-style stamps for an authentic poster design. Include another subtle vertical location inscription on the right cliff face. The mood is sacred, epic, ancient, mystical, and poetic, with premium concept-art polish and almost no generic AI look.
translatedPrompt: 一张受《西游记》启发的宏伟中国水墨奇幻海报，主体为 {argument name="character name" default="孙悟空"} 的左侧面双重曝光剪影，占据页面大部分空间。肖像由柔和的棕褐色、灰烬色、羊皮纸白和烟黑色水彩纹理构成，背景为灰白色纸张，带有飞溅的笔触边缘和留白。人物具有明显的猿猴面部轮廓、短须，额头上戴着金箍。在剪影内部及周围，构建一个层次分明的传统山水风格神话景观，包含发光的云雾、悬崖、云朵和古老的寺庙。在头部上方的中心位置，绘制一轮明月，月亮后方有一尊神圣的佛像，坐落于宏伟的天宫建筑群之上，建筑拥有多层屋檐。在右上部，展示 4 位取经人走在悬崖小径上：一位手持金箍棒的猴王、一位骑着白马的僧人、一位猪脸同伴以及一位身着黑袍的同伴。在中间位置，描绘 1 场猴王在云雾缭绕中与盘旋的龙或蛇进行激烈战斗的场景。在右下角，放置 1 座隐匿于山间的发光寺庙神龛，内部可见一尊金色的神像。在底部区域，添加 3 位在雾气弥漫的山谷中行走的微小朝圣者。运用大气深度、优雅的书法笔触、飘渺的云雾，以及精致的电影级构图，使其呈现出绘画质感而非数字感。在左侧添加垂直的中文书法，内容为 {argument name="title text" default="西游记"}，并配以较小的侧边垂直文字和几枚印章风格的印记，以呈现地道的海报设计。在右侧悬崖面上加入另一处隐约的垂直位置铭文。整体氛围神圣、史诗、古老、神秘且富有诗意，具备顶级概念艺术的质感，几乎没有常见的 AI 生成痕迹。

breakdown.creativeCore: 《西游记》水墨海报：此提示词可生成精致的中国水墨奇幻风格海报，采用双重曝光人物剪影，非常适合神话书籍封面、电影海报及文化概念艺术创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, fantasy, watercolor, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
